vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="55" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bearer" parent="lane_auth" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Bearer Token<br><font style="font-size:10px;font-style:italic;">Admin / Automation</font>" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="keycloak"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_kc_jwt" edge="1" parent="lane_auth" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;shadow=1;" value="MCP Server<br><font style="font-size:10px;font-style:italic;">Enforcement Point</font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Namespace Permissions<br><font style="font-size:10px;">(directory)<br>owner / group / style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Tentacle Permissions<br><font style="font-size:10px;">(file)<br>owner / group / mode</font>" tentacle check" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="100" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="evaluator" parent="lane_authz" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Evaluator<br>Rules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="80" x="10" y="120" as="geometry"
